description_long: This is a small, slender bottle with a white body and a blue cap. The bottle features a contoured neck and a slightly bulbous upper section, making it ergonomic to hold. Around the midsection, there is a printed label with colorful cartoon-style artwork, including a character with orange hair and another with green hair, both in playful poses. The cap appears to be made of plastic and fits snugly on top, likely a snap-on type. The bottle's surface is smooth and has a matte finish, with no visible branding or text. There are no signs of damage or wear, and the bottle appears clean and intact.
description: A small, white bottle with a blue cap and colorful cartoon artwork on its label, featuring a contoured shape and smooth matte surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's white body, blue cap, and a cartoon character with orange hair on the label.
description_view_1: This side view reveals part of the orange-haired character and the edge of another character, with the blue cap visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side displays a cartoon character with green hair and glasses, with the blue cap on top.
description_view_3: This view shows the transition between the green-haired and orange-haired characters, with the blue cap still prominent.
attribute_label_or_branding: Cartoon-style artwork with orange and green-haired characters, no visible text or branding.
